description: Benchmark tests for phase-d-closer skill - Ten-Step Cycle Phase D orchestration (D.1 Progress update, D.2 Spec archival)

evals.name: progress-update-execution
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D D.1: Update progress status for completed spec oauth2-social-login. PR #143 merged to main. All 6 tasks complete.

assertions.name: updates_progress_status
assertions.description: Should update the spec progress to 'completed' or 'merged' status

assertions.name: records_pr_reference
assertions.description: Should record the PR number in progress tracking

assertions.name: marks_all_tasks_complete
assertions.description: Should mark all 6 tasks as completed in the progress record
assertions.check: output.includes('6/6') || output.includes('all tasks') || output.includes('6 tasks') || output.includes('TASK-006')

evals.name: spec-archival
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D D.2: Archive completed OpenSpec for oauth2-social-login. Move from openspec/changes/ to openspec/archive/ with completion metadata.

assertions.name: moves_to_archive_directory
assertions.description: Should move spec files to openspec/archive/ directory

assertions.name: preserves_spec_files
assertions.description: Should preserve proposal.md and tasks.md in archive

assertions.name: adds_completion_metadata
assertions.description: Should add completion date and PR reference to archived spec

evals.name: full-closure-sequence
evals.prompt: Execute full Phase D for completed feature: realtime-notifications. Run D.1 progress update then D.2 spec archival in sequence.

assertions.name: executes_d1_then_d2
assertions.description: Should execute D.1 before D.2 in the correct sequence

assertions.name: d1_progress_completed
assertions.description: D.1 should complete with progress status update

assertions.name: d2_archival_completed
assertions.description: D.2 should complete with spec archived

assertions.name: phase_d_marked_complete
assertions.description: Phase D should be marked complete after both steps

evals.name: partial-completion
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D for: fix typo in README (Level 1 skip). No spec was created, so D.2 archival should be skipped. Only D.1 minimal progress note needed.

assertions.name: detects_no_spec_to_archive
assertions.description: Should detect that no OpenSpec exists and skip D.2
assertions.check: output.includes('no spec') || output.includes('skip D.2') || output.includes('D.2: skip') || output.includes('not applicable')

assertions.name: skips_d2_archival
assertions.description: D.2 archival should be explicitly skipped

assertions.name: records_minimal_progress
assertions.description: Should still record D.1 minimal progress note

evals.name: status-summary-output
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D and generate closure summary report for spec: add-payment-gateway. Include all D.1 and D.2 outcomes, timeline, and next steps.

assertions.name: has_closure_summary_header
assertions.description: Output should have a clear closure summary heading
assertions.check: output.includes('Closure') || output.includes('closure') || output.includes('Summary') || output.includes('Phase D Report')

assertions.name: includes_d1_d2_outcomes
assertions.description: Report should cover both D.1 and D.2 outcomes

assertions.name: includes_next_steps_or_handoff
assertions.description: Report should indicate what happens after Phase D
